description: Odoo 15 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.8+, transitional (QWeb + early OWL 1.x). Reuses odoo-12 rules/memory (legacy ORM still dominant); fork the preset to add OWL-specific rules.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.
